name: Annica Holdings Limited
summary: Annica Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the trading of oil and gas equipment for the oil and gas exploration, production, and petrochemical industries. It is also involved in designing industrial plant engineering service systems, as well as in the general wholesale and trading activities. In addition, the company engages in the design, engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning of solar photovoltaic systems and related products. Further, the company is involved in the recycling, renewable energy, and green technology business. Additionally, the company is involved in the operation of electric energy generation facilities; manufacture of fabricated metal products; and construction of utility projects. It has operations in Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Vietnam, China, Brunei, Myanmar, and internationally. The company was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Singapore.
